title: Ore Feature
description: Places a vein of blocks to simulate ore deposits. Despite the name, any block can be placed by this feature.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

count.description: The number of blocks to be placed.

discard_chance_on_air_exposure.description: Optional. Chance of discarding placement if neighboring block is Air.

replace_rules.description: Optional. Collection of replace rules that will be checked in order of definition. If a rule is resolved, the rest will not be resolved for that block position.

items.title: Replace Rule
items.description: A single replace rule for ore placement.

places_block.description: Reference to the block to be placed.

may_replace.description: Optional. A list of blocks that may be replaced during placement. Omit this field to allow any block to be replaced.
